item.title: DEFAULT_REPO_URL hardcoded in build/installer/source.ts
item.intent: OpenClaw repository URL has a single source of truth in config/defaults.ts. No hardcoded repo URL appears in source.ts.
item.description: src/build/installer/source.ts:23 defines const DEFAULT_REPO_URL = 'https://github.com/nicepkg/openclaw.git' as a local constant that is never exported or centralised. This is the canonical OpenClaw repository URL — if the repo URL ever changes (mirror, org rename), there is no single place to update it. Same BUG-011/BUG-025 pattern as other scattered constants. Steps: (1) add OPENCLAW_REPO_URL = 'https://github.com/nicepkg/openclaw.git' to src/config/defaults.ts; (2) import and replace DEFAULT_REPO_URL in source.ts; (3) check for any other hardcoded references to this URL in the codebase (grep for 'nicepkg/openclaw'); (4) run build/ tests. Scope: 2 files, ~3 lines changed.
